meta.title: Portfolio
meta.description: A distinctive portfolio website showcasing craft and attention to detail with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: Digital craft for ambitious brands
sections.subheadline: Strategic design and development that transforms how businesses connect.

sections.heading: Where strategy meets craft
sections.body:
Since 2014, partnered with startups and brands to build resonant digital experiences. Approach: understand deeply, challenge assumptions, craft lasting solutions.

Selective practice with limited projects for focused attention. Not about volume—about work that matters.

Intersection of design thinking and technical execution. Goal: measurable business impact through exceptional craft.

Recognition: Awwwards Site of the Day, CSS Design Awards, Communication Arts. Real metric: returning clients and referrals.

items.title: Meridian Finance: 40% conversion lift
items.description: Digital transformation for B2B fintech. Onboarding 14→4 steps, design system, sub-2s load times. Result: 40% conversion lift, $2.3M ARR.

items.title: Artisan Coffee Roasters: Tripled DTC revenue
items.description: E-commerce replatform: Shopify→Next.js. Subscription management, dynamic storytelling, roasting schedule. Result: 3x DTC revenue, 65% repeat purchase improvement.

items.title: Catalyst Ventures: Fund II close in 8 weeks
items.description: Brand and digital presence for Series A fund. Visual identity, investor portal with real-time tracking, automated LP reporting. Result: Fund II closed at $45M (2x target), 40% via digital platform.

items.title: Harvest Kitchen: 2x order value increase
items.description: Mobile-first ordering for restaurant group. Menu redesign, dynamic upselling, streamlined checkout. Result: 98% order value increase, 55% mobile conversion improvement.

items.title: Atlas Legal: 60% reduction in intake time
items.description: Client intake platform for law firm. Digital workflows, automated document generation, client portal. Result: intake 3 days→4 hours, 35% efficiency improvement.

items.title: Sonder Hotels: 4.8 star guest experience
items.description: In-room tablet for hotel chain. Digital concierge, room controls, local recommendations, service requests. Result: 4.8/5 satisfaction, 40% front desk load reduction.

items.title: Nova Health: Patient portal redesign
items.description: Patient portal for health clinic. Simplified scheduling, lab results, provider messaging. Result: 70% phone scheduling reduction, adoption 23%→78%.

items.title: Northbound Supply: B2B wholesale platform
items.description: Wholesale platform for outdoor gear. Tiered pricing, bulk ordering, inventory visibility. Result: 150% B2B volume increase, 85% order size increase, 45% inquiry reduction.

items.quote: They don't just design—they think. Challenged our assumptions and built something that moved the needle. 40% conversion increase first quarter.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: Strategic partner, not vendor. Understood our brand intimately and translated it into an experience customers love. Unmatched attention to detail.
items.name: Marcus Rodriguez

items.quote: Fund II closed in record time, largely due to their digital presence. Investor portal saved countless hours and impressed LPs.
items.name: Elena Vasquez
items.outcome: Fund II closed at 2x target in 8 weeks

items.quote: Understood our kitchen operations, not just brand. Ordering experience improved operational efficiency while delighting guests. Rare.
items.name: James Nakamura

sections.heading: Let's build something that matters together
